---
name: Bug report
about: Report a repository, catalog, validation, or canonical-skill problem
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Affected area

- [ ] canonical skill content
- [ ] catalog or provenance output
- [ ] validation script
- [ ] GitHub Actions
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] release process

## Reproduction

Steps, command, or file path that reproduces the issue.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead.

## Relevant files

List the affected paths if known.

## Additional context

Anything else needed to debug the issue.
